toast-success.title: Changes saved successfully
toast-success.description: Your profile has been updated. The changes will be visible to other users within a few minutes.

toast-error.title: Payment failed
toast-error.description: We couldn't process your payment. Please check your card details and try again.

toast-warning.title: Storage almost full
toast-warning.description: You've used 92% of your storage quota. Consider upgrading your plan or removing unused files.

toast-info.title: Scheduled maintenance
toast-info.description: A maintenance window is planned for Mar 12, 2026 from 02:00-04:00 UTC. Some services may be briefly unavailable.
